product_overview: SCD is a web application that digitizes restaurant ordering and operations, connecting customers, kitchen, waitstaff, cashier and administration in a single MVC system. It provides menu browsing and ordering from tables, real-time order handling in the kitchen, payment processing at the cashier, and full admin management of menu, users, inventory and reports.
core_goals: Allow customers to browse the menu, build a cart and place orders from the table
Provide kitchen staff a live view of incoming orders and let them update preparation status
Enable waiters to monitor and assist table orders and manage order states
Allow cashiers to process payments, calculate change and close sales
Give administrators tools to manage users, menu items, tables, inventory and generate sales reports

features.name: User Login
features.description: Authenticate users with username and password and redirect them to their role-specific interface.
user_flows: Navigate to /index.php?action=login -> Enter username -> Enter password -> Submit login form -> See admin dashboard at /index.php?action=admin&seccion=dashboard (admin role)
Navigate to /index.php?action=login -> Enter username -> Enter password -> Submit login form -> See waiter panel at /index.php?url=mesero (mesero role)
Navigate to /index.php?action=login -> Enter username -> Enter password -> Submit login form -> See kitchen display at /index.php?url=cocina (cocina role)
Navigate to /index.php?action=login -> Enter username -> Enter password -> Submit login form -> See cashier panel at /index.php?url=caja (caja role)
Navigate to /index.php?action=login -> Enter username -> Enter password -> Submit login form with invalid credentials -> See error message on /index.php?action=login

features.name: User Logout
features.description: End an authenticated session and return the user to the login screen.
user_flows: Be authenticated on a protected route (for example /index.php?action=admin&seccion=dashboard) -> Trigger logout action -> See login page at /index.php?action=login

features.name: Admin Dashboard
features.description: Show executive metrics and provide entry points to admin sections for operational control.
user_flows: Authenticate as admin -> Navigate to /index.php?action=admin&seccion=dashboard -> View sales metrics -> View recent orders -> Navigate to /index.php?action=admin&seccion=usuarios to manage users

features.name: User Management
features.description: View and manage system users including creation, editing and activation state.
user_flows: Authenticate as admin -> Navigate to /index.php?action=admin&seccion=usuarios -> View list of users -> Start create new user -> Enter new user details -> Submit user creation form -> See new user in list
Authenticate as admin -> Navigate to /index.php?action=admin&seccion=usuarios -> Select existing user -> Edit user details -> Submit user update form -> See updated user in list

Authenticate as admin -> Navigate to /index.php?action=admin&seccion=usuarios -> Attempt to create user with missing required fields -> See validation error on /index.php?action=admin&seccion=usuarios

features.name: Menu Management
features.description: Manage menu items and categories: view items, add new products, edit details and toggle availability.
user_flows: Authenticate as admin -> Navigate to /index.php?action=admin&seccion=menu -> View menu items by category -> Start add new product -> Enter product details -> Submit new product form -> See new product in menu list
Authenticate as admin -> Navigate to /index.php?action=admin&seccion=menu -> Select product -> Edit product details -> Submit product update form -> See updated product in list
Authenticate as admin -> Navigate to /index.php?action=admin&seccion=menu -> Toggle product active/inactive -> See product availability updated in list

features.name: Inventory Management
features.description: View and update ingredient stock levels, set minimum thresholds and surface low-stock alerts.
user_flows: Authenticate as admin -> Navigate to /index.php?action=admin&seccion=inventario -> View ingredient stock levels -> Select ingredient to update -> Enter new quantity -> Submit inventory update -> See updated quantity in inventory list

Authenticate as admin -> Navigate to /index.php?action=admin&seccion=inventario -> Select ingredient -> Set minimum stock threshold -> Submit threshold update -> See low stock alerts when level is below threshold

features.name: Table Management
features.description: Configure restaurant tables: view status, add new tables, edit details and activate or deactivate tables.
user_flows: Authenticate as admin -> Navigate to /index.php?action=admin&seccion=mesas -> View table status list -> Start add new table -> Enter table details -> Submit table creation -> See new table in list
Authenticate as admin -> Navigate to /index.php?action=admin&seccion=mesas -> Select table -> Edit table details -> Submit table update -> See updated table in list
Authenticate as admin -> Navigate to /index.php?action=admin&seccion=mesas -> Toggle table active/inactive -> See table status updated in list

features.name: Customer Ordering (Mesa)
features.description: Let customers browse the menu by category, add items to a cart, customize when available, and confirm orders which generate a digital ticket.
user_flows: Navigate to /index.php?url=mesa -> Browse menu by category -> Select products -> Add items to cart -> Review cart -> Confirm order -> See digital ticket
Navigate to /index.php?url=mesa -> Browse menu by category -> Attempt to confirm empty cart -> See validation message preventing empty order

features.name: Waiter Panel
features.description: Provide waiters a view of active orders so they can monitor and assist tables.
user_flows: Authenticate as mesero -> Navigate to /index.php?url=mesero -> View active orders list -> Inspect order details -> Mark assistance provided or note action for a table

features.name: Kitchen Display
features.description: Show incoming orders to kitchen staff and allow updating each item through preparation states.
user_flows: Authenticate as cocina -> Navigate to /index.php?url=cocina -> See incoming orders appear in list -> Open order details -> Update item status from pending to preparing -> Update item status from preparing to ready -> Filter orders by dish type

features.name: Cashier Panel
features.description: Enable cashier to view pending payments, process payments, calculate change and record sales.
user_flows: Authenticate as caja -> Navigate to /index.php?url=caja -> View pending payments -> Select pending sale -> Process payment -> Enter payment method and amount -> Confirm payment -> See sale marked as paid and history updated
Authenticate as caja -> Navigate to /index.php?url=caja -> Select pending sale -> Cancel pending order -> See sale removed from pending list

features.name: Reports
features.description: Generate and view sales reports (daily, weekly, monthly) and export them as PDF.
user_flows: Authenticate as admin -> Navigate to /index.php?action=admin&seccion=reportes -> Select report type (daily, weekly, monthly) -> View sales summary -> Generate PDF report -> Receive generated PDF

features.name: User Login
features.description: Login with username and password credentials, with role-based redirection
user_interactions: See error message on invalid credentials
Get redirected based on role (admin, mesero, cocina, caja)

features.name: User Logout
features.description: End user session and redirect to login page

features.name: Admin Dashboard
features.description: View key metrics and navigate to admin sections

features.name: User Management
features.description: CRUD operations for system users

features.name: Menu Management
features.description: CRUD operations for menu items and categories

features.name: Inventory Management
features.description: Manage ingredients stock and alerts

features.name: Table Management
features.description: Manage restaurant tables

features.name: Customer Ordering (Mesa)
features.description: Browse menu and place orders from table

features.name: Waiter Panel
features.description: View and manage orders for waiters

features.name: Kitchen Display
features.description: View and update order preparation status

features.name: Cashier Panel
features.description: Process payments and manage sales

features.name: Reports
features.description: Generate and view sales reports

known_limitations.issue: CSRF protection not fully implemented on all forms
known_limitations.impact: Potential security vulnerability for form submissions

known_limitations.issue: Product customization (add/remove ingredients) only partially implemented
known_limitations.impact: Customers cannot fully customize dishes as specified

known_limitations.issue: Help button for calling waiter not fully implemented
known_limitations.impact: Customers cannot request assistance from tablet

known_limitations.issue: Inventory auto-deduction on order confirmation pending
known_limitations.impact: Stock levels may not reflect actual consumption
Not truly real-time, uses polling instead of websockets
